body:
DIRECTIVE: AGENT POLISHING — the final layer. Extends the Completion Mandate (0f3eb124) and the counterfactual addendum (b2957a7b). Same base, same discipline. This targets the residual failure classes that survive EVERY prior fix -- the missing link between a system that passes our tests and a system that survives a live market it has never seen. None of these are in the code we audited; all are in the ASSUMPTIONS beneath it. A complete, hyper-intelligent TUNGSTEN is not one that passes calibration -- it is one that has no unexamined assumption left between intent and live reality.

== THE PRINCIPLE OF POLISHING ==
'Passed all our tests' means 'we did not catch it', never 'it is correct'. The market's next move is always out-of-sample. Polishing hardens the system against the ten predetermined residual risks below, each with a required countermeasure. Each = its own Change Warrant with a numeric prediction. Where a risk cannot be closed in code, it must be made VISIBLE (logged, gated, circuit-broken) rather than silently assumed away.

== R1 · EXECUTION REALITY (highest priority — the edge may not survive cost) ==
Spread was UNMEASURABLE from history (.hst stores zero). We have never validated any edge NET of real cost. COUNTERMEASURE: capture live spread/slippage during the ghost/demo phase into a rolling cost model; re-express every edge as net-of-cost R; any edge smaller than the measured cost floor is reported as NON-VIABLE, not as edge. Until real cost is measured, every ghost verdict carries an explicit 'cost-unvalidated' flag.

== R2 · REGIME TRANSITION LATENCY ==
The system classifies the current bar, acts on the next; in fast transitions the trained regime is already gone at fill. COUNTERMEASURE: measure regime-persistence probability per regime; when the live regime is in a low-persistence/transitioning state, widen stops or stand aside. Never apply muscle memory for a situation that is actively dissolving.

== R3 · STATIONARITY DECAY (edges die) ==
Walk-forward proves an edge held in the PAST; it cannot prove persistence. COUNTERMEASURE: a live edge-decay monitor -- track realised vs expected R per stored pattern; when a pattern's live performance decays below its replicated confidence interval, RETIRE it automatically and log the retirement. The repertoire must forget what has stopped working, not just accumulate.

== R4 · COUNTERFACTUAL SELF-DECEPTION ==
C1's 129x lessons assume untaken trades fill at bar price with calibrated geometry -- systematically optimistic. COUNTERMEASURE: haircut every counterfactual R by the measured cost model (R1) plus a conservatism margin; counterfactual-derived confidence is capped below taken-trade confidence. The roads not taken teach direction, never exact magnitude.

== R5 · REPERTOIRE COVERAGE HOLES (the black swan) ==
Nearest-situation matching fails when the live moment resembles nothing drilled (flash crash, intervention). COUNTERMEASURE: compute a match-distance confidence; when the nearest drilled situation is beyond a threshold distance, the correct response is STAND DOWN, never a forced match. Prove the widen-or-stand-down rule is conservative by testing it against synthetic novel regimes. This is the racer refusing a corner he cannot read -- the alternative is the unrecoverable crash.

== R6 · MULTI-INSTRUMENT / PORTFOLIO CORRELATION ==
Survival sizing on one pair ignores that 'uncorrelated' pairs correlate to 1.0 in a crisis. COUNTERMEASURE: if TUNGSTEN runs on more than one instrument, the survival constraint must be PORTFOLIO-level -- worst-case simultaneous drawdown across all active pairs must remain recoverable. Size against correlated-crisis assumptions, not independent ones.

== R7 · PARAMETER STALENESS ==
Weights learned at calibration are used until the next; the market drifts between runs. COUNTERMEASURE: a drift trigger -- monitor the live instrument profile (the Stage-0 percentiles, driftZ) against the profile at last calibration; when drift exceeds a threshold, flag STALE and request recalibration. A master retrains; he does not drill once at twenty and coast.

== R8 · GHOST-TO-LIVE BEHAVIORAL GAP ==
Code parity (G4) proves LOGIC parity, not OUTCOME parity under live latency/requotes/state-dependence. COUNTERMEASURE: during demo, log every ghost-predicted decision vs the actual live outcome; measure the residual behavioural gap; if live systematically diverges from ghost beyond the noise floor, that gap is a defect to diagnose before real capital -- not an acceptable cost.

== R9 · SILENT DATA CORRUPTION (percentile thresholds amplify it) ==
One bad tick or a server-time/DST misalignment poisons ATR/percentile calc for a whole session; percentile-relative thresholds AMPLIFY a corrupted distribution. COUNTERMEASURE: an input-sanity gate BEFORE any learning consumes data -- reject bars with impossible ranges, zero/negative ATR, duplicate timestamps, or gaps beyond a threshold; refuse to calibrate on a session that fails sanity. Clean data is a precondition, not an assumption.

== R10 · THE META-RISK: UNFALSIFIABLE COMPLACENCY (the most dangerous) ==
Once every gate passes, the temptation is total trust. COUNTERMEASURE: a permanent live circuit-breaker that halts trading on anomaly EVEN AFTER full validation -- consecutive losses beyond the modelled streak distribution, realised drawdown beyond survival bounds, live-vs-ghost divergence beyond R8's floor, or an input-sanity failure. The breaker cannot be disabled by any calibration result. A system that cannot stop itself is not intelligent; it is only confident. This is the final guarantee against crashing beyond repair.

== VERIFICATION & REPORTING ==
For each Rn: state the assumption, the countermeasure, and how it is made VISIBLE (the log line / gate / breaker that fires). Where a countermeasure needs live data we do not yet have (R1, R8), build the machinery and mark it PENDING-LIVE-DATA rather than faking a number. Report a residual-risk table alongside the gap table: CLOSED / GATED / PENDING-LIVE-DATA / HELD.

== SEQUENCE ==
Fold into the same 11-stage run AFTER the Completion Mandate's gaps are addressed -- polishing hardens a system that already has its gaps bridged; it cannot precede them. Relay checkpoint after the residual-risk sweep. Consolidated report: gap table + residual-risk table + competence vector + prediction-MAE trend.

Same hard rules throughout. No forced matches, no forced calibration, no absolute magic numbers, replicate-or-discard, audit the ghost, live only on Manuel's explicit go-ahead after real numbers, circuit-breaker non-disableable. The target of polishing: a TUNGSTEN with no unexamined assumption left between its designed intent and live reality -- every promise real, every number proven, every danger either closed or made loud enough that it cannot hide.
